message:
a11y(reviews): add ARIA labels, pressed states, and live regions

- ReviewForm: aria-pressed on rating buttons, aria-describedby linking
  textarea to character count, aria-invalid for over-limit
- ReviewCard: aria-pressed + aria-label on vote buttons, aria-live
  region wrapping report feedback, role="status" and role="alert"
- ReviewList: role="list" + role="listitem" for review items,
  role="alertdialog" on delete confirmation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
